AML Tool

Real-Time Wallet Risk Detection
for AML Compliance

Delivers real-time analysis to detect compromised wallets and illicit activity, such as stolen or phished funds. Using advanced algorithms, the tool flags high-risk transactions, supports compliance, and safeguards your organization and assets against financial crime.

Demo Mode Active

Currently displaying demonstration data until your wallet is connected.
